case_title: ROBERTO GRAU VS. ALFREDO OROPEZA et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ROBERTO GRAU, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-27-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-14-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DIANA CHEN, CSR#11312. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-27-2006 CONTINUED TO MAY-30-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-30-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR, CSR#1170. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair, CSR#1170. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Continued To May-30-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/30/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-27-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
